description_long: This object consists of a large, flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, mounted on a modern, light-colored TV stand. The television is supported by a metallic, X-shaped stand and is accompanied by a small stack of books or media cases placed on the left side of the stand. The TV stand features three central drawers with curved handles and two side cabinets, all elevated on four tapered legs. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with smooth surfaces and minimal ornamentation. The television's screen is dark and reflective, while the stand has a matte finish.
description: A large flat-screen television with a thin black bezel sits atop a modern, light-colored TV stand with drawers and tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the television's screen, thin bezel, X-shaped stand, and the TV stand's drawers and books on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile of the television and the depth of the TV stand.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the television, the X-shaped stand, and the smooth back of the TV stand.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the television's thinness and the books placed on the TV stand.
attribute_bezel_design: thin, black, plastic bezel with a sleek, modern appearance
